data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] suite-engine.sh sources red-zone.sh when SUITE_TEST_INDEX is set
  Verify: grep -q 'source.*red-zone.sh' tests/lib/suite-engine.sh
- [ ] When SUITE_TEST_INDEX is set and test fails, suite-engine checks if all failures are in RED zone
- [ ] TOLERATED count appears in summary when RED-zone failures are tolerated
  Verify: SUITE_TEST_INDEX=/dev/null bash tests/lib/suite-engine.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'TOLERATED:' || echo 'skip - needs marker'
- [ ] Exit 0 when ALL failures are RED-zone tolerated
- [ ] Exit non-zero when any failure is before RED marker (pre-marker)
- [ ] Unparseable test output treated as real failure (conservative fail-safe)
- [ ] No behavior change when SUITE_TEST_INDEX is unset
- [ ] RED tolerance tests pass: bash tests/hooks/test-suite-engine-red-tolerance.sh
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-suite-engine-red-tolerance.sh
